nodes.name: create_source.sql
nodes.summary: Defines the RisingWave source for ingesting Prometheus metrics data, specifying the schema and connector properties for the integration test.

nodes.name: create_mv.sql
nodes.summary: Creates materialized views over the Prometheus source to aggregate or transform metrics data for downstream querying in the integration test.

nodes.name: create_user.sql
nodes.summary: Creates a RisingWave user with the necessary permissions for the Prometheus integration test environment.

nodes.name: query.sql
nodes.summary: Verification queries against the Prometheus materialized views, used to validate that data flows correctly in the integration test.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose file orchestrating RisingWave, Prometheus, and related services for the Prometheus metrics integration test environment.

nodes.name: prometheus.yaml
nodes.summary: Prometheus configuration defining global scrape intervals, scrape job targets, and remote_write endpoints for forwarding metrics to RisingWave.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes remote_write section routing scraped metrics into RisingWave as the sink.
